query: SELECT sheetMusicAbc FROM songs WHERE id = 210035;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27tCrNWdmQHZC2L.1303e64f5668 --database Q3oEbCsP6DUj527aoyypq7 --execute SELECT sheetMusicAbc FROM songs WHERE id = 210035;

rows.sheetMusicAbc: T:Men of The Father's House
K:G
V:1 treble
"G"D2 G2 B2 d2 | "C"e2 d2 c2 B2 | "G"G2 B2 d2 B2 | "D"A4 z4 |
w: Men of the Fa-ther's House, stand up and sing His praise!
"G"D2 G2 B2 d2 | "C"e2 d2 c2 B2 | "G"G2 B2 d2 B2 | "D"A4 z4 |
w: Men of the Fa-ther's House, through all your liv-ing days!
"Em"G2 A2 B2 c2 | "C"d2 c2 B2 G2 | "G"E2 G2 B2 d2 | "D"c4 z4 |
w: With hearts a-flame, pro-claim His Name, let ev-ery na-tion hear,
"G"D2 G2 B2 d2 | "C"e2 d2 c2 B2 | "G"G2 B2 d2 B2 | "D"A4 z4 |
w: Men of the Fa-ther's House, cast out all doubt and fear!
"G"G2 B2 d2 B2 | "C"c2 d2 e2 d2 | "G"B2 G2 D2 E2 | "D"D4 z4 |
w: For He is Lord, our great re-ward, His love will nev-er cease!
"G"G2 B2 d2 B2 | "C"c2 d2 e2 d2 | "G"B2 G2 D2 E2 | "D"D4 z4 |
w: So lift your voice, make Him your choice, and live in joy and peace!
